## College Financial Planning Guide

Below is a comprehensive financial breakdown designed for a student balancing academic responsibilities with employment and budget management.

### Budget Structure & Recommendations

```json
{
  "Income": [
    {
      "Part-time Job",
      "$300/month net"
    },
    {
      "Financial Aid / Scholarship",
      "$1,500/month stipend"
    }
  ],
  "Expenses": {
    "Tuition & Fees": "$8,000/semester",
    "Living Expenses": {
      "Housing/Rent": "$600/month",
      "Food": "$300/month",
      "Transportation": "$100/month"
    }
  },
  "Savings": {
    "Emergency Fund": "$1,000/month target",
    "Endowment/Growth": "$200/month target"
  },
  "Strategies": [
    "Use meal prepping apps to reduce grocery costs",
    "Automate savings from direct deposit",
    "Review financial aid package quarterly",
    "Track weekly expenses using a personal finance app"
  ]
}
```<|im_end|>
